description:
Draws a laserbeam and a lightpoint at the impact location of the laser.
This command has to be executed every frame - see {{Link|Arma 3: Mission Event Handlers#Draw3D}}.
Lasers drawn with this command are subject to the same limitations as weapon attachment lasers. These limitations are defined in the {{hl|CfgIRLaserSettings}} config class.
name: drawLaser

Item.desc: laser beam color. The values can go way above the usual 0..1 range as they also act as emissivity brightness
Item.name: beamColor

Item.desc: impact dot color. Set to <sqf inline>[]</sqf> to use the same value as ''beamColor''.
Item.name: dotColor

Item.desc: impact dot size; if set to 0 the impact dot will not render
Item.name: dotSize

Item.desc: laser beam's thickness scale; if set to 0, the beam will not render
Item.name: beamThickness

Item.desc: (Optional, default -1) laser beam's maximum length. {{hl|-1}} means maximum length (defined in {{hl|CfgIRLaserSettings}}), {{hl|0}} means no length at all and the command is ignored
Item.name: beamMaxLength

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[true]]) whether the laser and impact dot are only visible with Night Vision / Thermal Imaging
Item.name: isIR
